description:
You are a Financial Manager (CFA charterholder) at Westbrook Family Office. The Westbrook family has allocated $500,000 for a new dividend income strategy. Create a portfolio in JStock named exactly 'Income Portfolio' and record the following transactions and dividend entries. Comments are required for compliance tagging.

Buy Transactions (January 15, 2024, broker fee $9.99 each):
- T (AT&T Inc.): 200 shares at $17.11 per share; comment: 'high-yield telecom'
- VZ (Verizon Communications): 150 shares at $38.58 per share; comment: '5G income'
- KO (Coca-Cola Co.): 10

metadata.data_source: Yahoo Finance closing prices Jan 15, 2024; company dividend schedules
